--- match_coverage_subpaths.sql
GRAPH FinGraph
-- Path Modes and Subpaths
MATCH TRAIL (a)->{2,}(b)
RETURN *
NEXT
MATCH TRAIL ((a)-[e]->(b)){0, }
RETURN *
NEXT
MATCH ANY SHORTEST (TRAIL ->{1,4})
RETURN *

--- AST
&ast.GQLGraphQuery{
  GraphClause: &ast.GQLGraphClause{
    PropertyGraphName: &ast.Path{
      Idents: []*ast.Ident{
        &ast.Ident{
          NamePos: 6,
          NameEnd: 14,
          Name:    "FinGraph",
        },
      },
    },
  },
  Query: &ast.GQLMultiLinearQueryStatement{
    Statements: []ast.GQLLinearQueryStatement{
      &ast.GQLSimpleLinearQueryStatement{
        Statements: []ast.GQLPrimitiveQueryStatement{
          &ast.GQLMatch{
            Optional: -1,
            Match:    42,
            Pattern:  &ast.GQLGraphPattern{
              Paths: []*ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                &ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                  Mode: &ast.GQLPathModeClause{
                    StartPos: 48,
                    EndPos:   53,
                    Mode:     "TRAIL",
                  },
                  Path: &ast.GQLPathPattern{
                    Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  54,
                          Rparen:  56,
                          Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 55,
                              NameEnd: 56,
                              Name:    "a",
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLEdgePattern{
                          StartPos:  57,
                          EndPos:    59,
                          Direction: "RIGHT",
                        },
                        Quantifier: &ast.GQLBoundedQuantifier{
                          Lbrace: 59,
                          Rbrace: 62,
                          Low:    &ast.IntLiteral{
                            ValuePos: 60,
                            ValueEnd: 61,
                            Base:     10,
                            Value:    "2",
                          },
                          Comma: 61,
                        },
                      },
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  63,
                          Rparen:  65,
                          Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 64,
                              NameEnd: 65,
                              Name:    "b",
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                    },
                  },
                },
              },
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLReturn{
            Return: 67,
            Items:  []*ast.GQLReturnItem{
              &ast.GQLReturnItem{
                Star: 74,
              },
            },
          },
        },
      },
      &ast.GQLSimpleLinearQueryStatement{
        Statements: []ast.GQLPrimitiveQueryStatement{
          &ast.GQLMatch{
            Optional: -1,
            Match:    81,
            Pattern:  &ast.GQLGraphPattern{
              Paths: []*ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                &ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                  Mode: &ast.GQLPathModeClause{
                    StartPos: 87,
                    EndPos:   92,
                    Mode:     "TRAIL",
                  },
                  Path: &ast.GQLPathPattern{
                    Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLSubpathPattern{
                          Lparen: 93,
                          Rparen: 106,
                          Path:   &ast.GQLPathPattern{
                            Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
                              &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                                Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                                  Lparen:  94,
                                  Rparen:  96,
                                  Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                                    EmptyPos: -1,
                                    Variable: &ast.Ident{
                                      NamePos: 95,
                                      NameEnd: 96,
                                      Name:    "a",
                                    },
                                  },
                                },
                              },
                              &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                                Primary: &ast.GQLEdgePattern{
                                  StartPos:  97,
                                  EndPos:    103,
                                  Direction: "RIGHT",
                                  Filler:    &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                                    EmptyPos: -1,
                                    Variable: &ast.Ident{
                                      NamePos: 99,
                                      NameEnd: 100,
                                      Name:    "e",
                                    },
                                  },
                                },
                              },
                              &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                                Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                                  Lparen:  103,
                                  Rparen:  105,
                                  Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                                    EmptyPos: -1,
                                    Variable: &ast.Ident{
                                      NamePos: 104,
                                      NameEnd: 105,
                                      Name:    "b",
                                    },
                                  },
                                },
                              },
                            },
                          },
                        },
                        Quantifier: &ast.GQLBoundedQuantifier{
                          Lbrace: 107,
                          Rbrace: 111,
                          Low:    &ast.IntLiteral{
                            ValuePos: 108,
                            ValueEnd: 109,
                            Base:     10,
                            Value:    "0",
                          },
                          Comma: 109,
                        },
                      },
                    },
                  },
                },
              },
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLReturn{
            Return: 113,
            Items:  []*ast.GQLReturnItem{
              &ast.GQLReturnItem{
                Star: 120,
              },
            },
          },
        },
      },
      &ast.GQLSimpleLinearQueryStatement{
        Statements: []ast.GQLPrimitiveQueryStatement{
          &ast.GQLMatch{
            Optional: -1,
            Match:    127,
            Pattern:  &ast.GQLGraphPattern{
              Paths: []*ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                &ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                  SearchPrefix: &ast.GQLPathSearchPrefix{
                    StartPos: 133,
                    EndPos:   145,
                    Prefix:   "ANY SHORTEST",
                  },
                  Path: &ast.GQLPathPattern{
                    Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLSubpathPattern{
                          Lparen: 146,
                          Rparen: 160,
                          Mode:   &ast.GQLPathModeClause{
                            StartPos: 147,
                            EndPos:   152,
                            Mode:     "TRAIL",
                          },
                          Path: &ast.GQLPathPattern{
                            Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
                              &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                                Primary: &ast.GQLEdgePattern{
                                  StartPos:  153,
                                  EndPos:    155,
                                  Direction: "RIGHT",
                                },
                                Quantifier: &ast.GQLBoundedQuantifier{
                                  Lbrace: 155,
                                  Rbrace: 159,
                                  Low:    &ast.IntLiteral{
                                    ValuePos: 156,
                                    ValueEnd: 157,
                                    Base:     10,
                                    Value:    "1",
                                  },
                                  High: &ast.IntLiteral{
                                    ValuePos: 158,
                                    ValueEnd: 159,
                                    Base:     10,
                                    Value:    "4",
                                  },
                                  Comma: 157,
                                },
                              },
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                    },
                  },
                },
              },
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLReturn{
            Return: 162,
            Items:  []*ast.GQLReturnItem{
              &ast.GQLReturnItem{
                Star: 169,
              },
            },
          },
        },
      },
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
GRAPH FinGraph MATCH TRAIL (a)->{2,}(b) RETURN * NEXT MATCH TRAIL ((a)-[e]->(b)){0,} RETURN * NEXT MATCH ANY SHORTEST (TRAIL ->{1,4}) RETURN *
